title: Framework for LLM-Enabled Construction Robot Task Planning: Knowledge Base Preparation and Robot–LLM Dialogue for Interior Wall Painting
inputData: 文本（自然语言任务描述）
contribution: 构建基于LLM的建筑机器人任务规划框架，通过知识库准备和提示工程实现自然语言到机器人指令的转换
pdfFile: Kim et al. - 2025 - Framework for LLM-Enabled Construction Robot Task Planning Knowledge Base Preparation and Robot–LLM.pdf
markdownFile: Kim et al. - 2025 - Framework for LLM-Enabled Construction Robot Task Planning Knowledge Base Preparation and Robot–LLM.md
abstract: This paper presents a novel framework that uses an LLM (ChatGPT-4) as the cognitive core for autonomous construction robot task planning, encompassing both a data preparation phase that structures BIM data, robot profiles, and task specifications into a knowledge base, and a real-time robot-LLM communication phase for adaptive task execution. A prototype painting robot (Husky UGV with UR5 arm) was tested in Gazebo simulation, successfully executing interior wall painting tasks through dynamic dialogue with ChatGPT-4 and responding to superintendent input for plan modifications and motion parameter adjustments.
methodology: The framework operates in two phases: (1) a knowledge base preparation phase that extracts and formats structured BIM data, natural language task specifications, robot profiles, and interaction guidelines, and (2) a real-time robot-LLM dialogue phase where the robot submits prompts to ChatGPT-4 and receives JSON-formatted instructions to execute skills, implemented as a ROS-based prototype with Autodesk Revit BIM integration and Gazebo simulation.
results: In a simulated interior wall painting case study with a Husky UGV and UR5 arm, the robot successfully completed painting across 9 locations through 43 prompt-response exchanges (average response time 4.32s) in the standard scenario, and 32 exchanges (average response time 4.86s) in the superintendent-input scenario, with 10/10 successful trial completions in each phase; the system demonstrated adaptive replanning and motion parameter adjustment capabilities without hardcoded logic.
